"issue_id": "WIZ-12345",
"threat_name": "Crypto Mining on OpenShift",
"severity": "Critical",
"affected_assets": [{"type": "pod", "name": "miner-pod"}],
"blast_radius": "Production namespace + 12 workloads",
"remediation": "Kill pod and apply restrictive SCC"
}
